---
title: "Suzanne De Witt"
---

## Suzanne De Witt

**Dates:** (1866-1934)

### Description

youngest daughter of Pauline (Guizot) de Witt

### Biography

[<i>Lettres à sa fille Henriette</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from August 11. [1869]
- Letter from August 10. [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
